falsification_conditions.condition: Price rises above the 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A strong bullish breakout would contradict the pattern's expectation of a bottom, invalidating the HOLD signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Blowoff score increases to 60+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 indicates extreme volatility or a potential blowoff top, directly opposing the bottom pattern's assumptions.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume remains below 50% of the 20-day average for all 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained low volume would indicate lack of participation, contradicting the typical volume surge expected during a bottom formation.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
